ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "bat_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throw_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "rookie_season" INTEGER /* Season the player became a rookie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Schedule type (full season, postseason, or spring training) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "bat_side" TEXT /* Batting side of the player (R or L) */,
  "plate_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of plate appearances */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at bats */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of RBIs */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies */,
  "sacrifice_hits" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice hits */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Number of times hit by pitch */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "shifts" INTEGER /* Number of shifts applied */,
  "shift_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of shifts applied */,
  "wOBA_no_shift" REAL /* wOBA when no shift was applied */,
  "wOBA_shift" REAL /* wOBA when a shift was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team (average wins per games played) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Coaching role (e.g., hitting coach, pitching coach) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the coach (average wins per games coached) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., batting, pitching, fielding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the platform */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the shift was applied to */,
  "shift_type" TEXT /* Type of shift applied (e.g., defensive shift) */,
  "shift_date" TEXT /* Date the shift was applied */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning the shift was applied */,
  "batter_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the batter's at-bat (e.g., hit, out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shifts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shifts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, free agency) */,
  "new_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new team (if applicable) */,
  "old_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the old team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_new_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_old_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("old_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
